guion_padre.introduccion: Welcome to Lesson 12. Today we will explore some wonderful sounds.
guion_padre.instruccion_z: Point to the big Z and say: zzzzzz. Keep the sound going!
guion_padre.instruccion_x: Now point to the big X and say: xxxxxx.

parent_story: A zebra played a xylophone. A smart fox danced zip-zap to the happy song.
